The $W Airdrop checker has officially started!

Exclusively for $JUP & $WEN eligiblle wallets

The eligibility checker allows users to determine if they are eligible for this $W airdrop. Using its intuitive interface, users can connect their SOL wallets and view rewards.

Check your eligibility now.
